title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 13 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 13 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 13 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 13/11/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 1.68 % today, the main contract closed at 966.5. The steel mills are not active to purchase.The overall trading sentiment of the market is general. PBF at Shandong port deal 985-990 yuan/mt.
